caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, pointed grey wig, glasses, and a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black broadcast microphone. In the background, there are framed photos on a wall, clothing on mannequins, and garments hanging on racks, including one item with "LEE" visible. To the left and right of the man, "TALK JOY PODCAST" logos appear on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly and he moves his head, looking toward the left and then adjusting his gaze. His arms are crossed in front of him, and he appears to be speaking or reacting during a recording session.
